parameters: Your Majesty, where could you have gotten to at a time like this!?
How dare those disgusting demons wander the castle like they have
the right! ...Still, the gardemons do carry you if you ask them to.
If you want to go to the dungeons, pull that lever over there.
Head all the way down and you'll see the entrance on your right.
Not that the knights would allow it.
Ahhh, I'm thirsty! The air's kept really dry in here for all the books!
My skin's dried out just from wandering the castle!
You can use this lever to lower the ladder. It's useful for getting
down to the first floor, but it retracts automatically.
It's a real pain whenever you want to come back up. I wonder why
*Pant* *Pant*... Why does this castle have so many floors!?
All of these stairs are doing me in!
Just ask a demon when you want to head upstairs. We'll give you a lift.
There's one stationed near the entrance.
